productDisplayName: Rockport Men Captoe Brown Casual Shoes
description: Slip into laidback comfort with these cap Toe Hi shoes. Coming from rockport's Clearview series, these shoes feature uppers crafted from premium leather with stitch detailing for extra style. Engineered with adidas AdiPRENE technology, this shoe offers all-day cushioning comfort making it a great buy. Upper Premium leather upper for a soft plush feel Stitch detailing for greater style Lace-ups for a snug Fit Heel cup for greater structure and stability Brand logo embedded behind the collar Midsole Highly shock-absorbent adiPRENE technology infused cushioning protects the heel on impact for all day cushioned comfort Polyurethane (PU) Midsole Offers durability for long-term wear & shock absorbent-cushioning to help reduce foot fatigue Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole delivers shock absorption thereby reducing foot fatigue Herringbone pattern provides better traction Flex grooves provide flexibility in foot movement
